name: small CPA firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For small CPA firms processing 5–15 clients/month, outdated tax law knowledge causes compliance issues. We automate tax law updates instead of manual tracking of tax law changes.
problem_solved: Keeping client accounting records updated with the latest tax law changes.
features: manual entry for tax law changes
